current_active_queue.label: Continuous Execution Readiness And Rollout
current_active_queue.why_now: The owner explicitly asked for continuous autonomous execution, and the documented readiness trigger is now satisfied by existing gate, interaction-default, learning-metrics, and low-risk target-trial evidence. This promotion changes the active queue focus to the continuous-execution follow-on plan without changing the current selector or authorizing heavy LTP work.

certified_baseline.label: Complete Hybrid Final-State Realization
certified_baseline.claim_boundary: Certified closure remains historical proof of capability closure. It does not override current stale, degraded, or recovered live posture.

current_live_posture.summary: Fresh 2026-06-09 target-run evidence now shows both Codex target runs and the Claude workload probe at native_attach/ready. Keep stronger live-host claims tied to fresh evidence, and keep separate host snapshot attention from this recovered live target-run posture.

rollback_ref: git revert docs/architecture/planning-status.json and dependent doc/gate updates
